_notes: 20 prompts spanning 4 shapes: should-skip (clear), cross-project, adversarial vague, DemoSaaS variants. Used for the shape-coverage eval supplement.

prompts.text: Update src/auth/login.ts to use JWT refresh tokens with 24h expiry, don't break the /api/v1/auth endpoint, and add Jest tests for happy-path and 401 cases.
Fix the off-by-one bug in dashboard.py line 312 — the loop should iterate through all 12 features, not 11.
Create tests/test_seo_engine.py with 5 pytest cases for seo_content_engine.py: empty keyword, missing API key, valid keyword, network failure, malformed JSON response.
Refactor wordpress_publisher.py to extract markdown→HTML conversion into a new module called markdown_to_wp_html.py. Don't change the public API of publish_article().
In ad_copy_generator.py, switch the LLM provider from anthropic to deepseek (OpenAI-compatible). Update env var to DEEPSEEK_API_KEY. Keep all generation logic, prompts, and output schemas unchanged.
Add a dark-mode toggle to the ArchTrack admin dashboard
Fix the auth flow in the openclaw-debugger pipeline
Build a new daily summary widget for the mission-control project
Set up a cron job for the inbox-monitor task
Add error handling to the bensbites-implementation runner script
